items.title: Bryson DeChambeau irate after being assessed two-stroke penalty for stomping grass at The Open 2026
items.summary: After his round concluded, DeChambeau was called back out to the 5th for trampling down the grass behind his ball
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Tammy Beaumont, Sarah Bryce burn through run chase as The Blaze triumph
items.summary: Kirstie Gordon takes three wickets to restrict Durham to sub-par total
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Stick with Tuchel unless Guardiola is available - Rooney
items.summary: Wayne Rooney thinks the Football Association should stick with Thomas Tuchel as England head coach unless a move for Pep Guardiola is possible.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
